title: MORK BORG Solitary Defilement - Session One
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UOOBf83nIco

Daniel (@dungeondive) showcases the first gameplay session of his solo Mörk Borg campaign. Starting from the black tree swamp, Vimet Heleg begins his quest to reach Pigskin Port. The video demonstrates the overland crawl mechanics from Solitary Defilement, including weather rolls, travel checks, dungeon micro-crawls, and random encounters. A critical moment occurs when a wild beast steals provisions, forcing Vimet to pursue and fight it. The session shows how charts, dice rolls, and oracle tables create a structured yet emergent narrative experience in solo play.

----

What random encounters or complications have derailed your plans in solo RPGs?
